Package neqsim.mcp.model

package neqsim.mcp.model
Typed model classes for NeqSim MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration.

This package provides Java POJOs for request and response models used by the MCP runner layer. These complement the string-based run(String json) interface with typed alternatives for direct Java consumers, and enable auto-generation of JSON schemas for MCP tool declarations.

Core types:

  • ValueWithUnit — numeric value with unit string
  • DiagnosticIssue — validation/simulation issue
  • ApiEnvelope — standard response envelope
  • FlashRequest — typed flash calculation input
  • FlashResult — typed flash calculation output
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ApiEnvelope<T>
    Standard API envelope for all MCP runner responses.
    DiagnosticIssue
    A diagnostic issue found during validation or simulation.
    FlashRequest
    Typed request model for flash calculations.
    FlashResult
    Typed result model for flash calculations.
    ProcessResult
    Typed result model for process simulations.
    ResultProvenance
    Provenance metadata for every MCP calculation result.
    ValueWithUnit
    A numeric value with its associated unit.
